news.t: Roundhill Launches Robotaxi, Autonomous Vehicles & Technology ETF (CABZ)

holdings.infoBox: CABZ is an equity ETF with a total of 29 individual holdings. The top holdings are Tesla stock at 8.57%, Ouster at 7.47%, Alphabet at 6.59%, Aeva Technologies at 6.54%, and Uber Technologies at 5.23%.

overview.description: The Roundhill Robotaxi, Autonomous Vehicles & Technology ETF (CABZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in the global transportation industry, including robotaxi, autonomous vehicles and technology companies. CABZ was launched on Jan 14, 2026 and is issued by Roundhill.

data.title: Roundhill Launches Robotaxi, Autonomous Vehicles & Technology ETF (CABZ)
data.text: CABZ offers targeted exposure to the companies leading the development of self-driving cars and robotaxi technology. NEW YORK, Jan. 14, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Roundhill Investments, an ETF sponsor focus...
